name: Epigonen, the Impersonation Invader
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>模</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>拘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エピゴネン
desc: You can Tribute 1 Effect Monster: Special Summon this card from your hand, then Special Summon 1 "Epigonos Token" (Level 1/ATK 0/ DEF 0) with the same Type and Attribute as the Tributed monster's original Type and Attribute. You can only use this effect of "Epigonen, the Impersonation Invader" once per turn.
